subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! This is Thy servant, sprung from the loins of one who hath believed in Thee and in Thy signs, and branched forth from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی هذا عبدک المنبثق من ظهر من آمن بک و بایاتک و المنشعب من
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @eulogies; reminiscences, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar]
